item.title: MariaDB
item.description: WARNING: This Ansible role is currently in beta state. Use it at your own risk.

item.title: Redis
item.description: WARNING: This Ansible role is currently in beta state. Use it at your own risk. Ansible role to setup Redis server Table of content Default Variables redis_appendfsync redis_appendonly redis_bind_interface redis_databases redis_dbdir redis_dbfilename redis_disabled_commands redis_includes redis_logfile redis_loglevel redis_maxmemory redis_maxmemory_policy redis_maxmemory_samples redis_packages redis_packages_extra redis_port redis_rdbcompression redis_requirepass redis_save redis_timeout redis_unixsocket Dependencies License Author Default Variables redis_appendfsync Default value redis_appendfsync: everysec redis_appendonly Default value redis_appendonly: no redis_bind_interface Default value redis_bind_interface: 127.
